experiment_6.Task: Cluster single-cell RNA-seq data in Galaxy and produce cluster and marker-gene visualizations.
experiment_6.Prompt: I have a single-cell RNA-seq dataset in Matrix Market format with barcode and gene files. I want a Galaxy analysis that identifies cell clusters with the Louvain algorithm and provides UMAP and marker-gene visualizations. Please choose an appropriate Galaxy workflow or training material, run it, and report the normalization tool, the genes shown in the dotplot of top genes on clusters, and the total number of workflow tool steps in the workflow you actually ran.
